news.title: Over 15 property owners booked for tenant verification lapses in Samba
news.para: Jammu and Kashmir Police have filed 19 FIRs against property owners in Samba district for failing to provide tenant details. This action stems from a special verification drive aimed at enhancing security and ensuring compliance with mandatory tenant verification norms. The District Magistrate had ordered the police verification of tenants, but owners did not comply, leading to legal action.

news.title: NCZ restoration puts focus on delayed mapping of Aravali, conservation zones
news.para: In April 2022, National Green Tribunal (NGT) had ordered the Board to complete mapping of NCZ. Experts working for protection of Aravali and NCZ in NCR said the Board should expedite the process to comply with the tribunal’s order. While UP and Rajasthan have completed the delineation of NCZ after carrying out the ground truthing exercise, Haryana and Delhi are still in the process of finalising this.

news.title: Noida: Residents of Mahagun Moderne oppose common area maintenance fee hike
news.para: Residents of Mahagun Moderne Society protested a hike in maintenance charges. They also raised concerns about blocked fire exits and alleged undemocratic AOA elections. Residents demand accountability and rollback of charges. The AOA president stated the hike complies with government orders and dismissed safety violation claims.

news.title: Mumbai records 70 redevelopment agreements in Q1 2026: Report
news.para: According to Knight Frank India, Mumbai’s redevelopment pipeline could unlock nearly 59,000 homes worth about ₹1.5 lakh crore by 2031. Society redevelopment projects are expected to generate about ₹9,115 crore in stamp duty revenues over their project lifecycle.

news.title: Shriram Properties to jointly develop 9.1 acres land in Bengaluru
news.para: Shriram Properties has entered into a joint development agreement for a 9.1-acre land parcel in Doddagubbi, North-East Bengaluru. This project boasts a development potential of 6.7 lakh sq ft and an estimated gross development value exceeding ₹600 crore. The company anticipates launching the project within the current financial year, citing the region's strong residential growth prospects.

news.title: India office leasing may grow 12-14% in FY27: Ind-Ra
news.para: India Ratings and Research expects office absorption to rise over 10% year-on-year to 79-80 million sq ft in FY26. Leasing is projected to grow 12-14% to 85-90 million sq ft in FY27, supported by GCCs and flex operators.

news.title: Noida Airport begins passenger flights; first flight from Lucknow
news.para: Noida International Airport commenced operations with an IndiGo flight from Lucknow, followed by a return flight carrying 172 local villagers. This marks Delhi NCR as a megacity with multiple airports, aiming to become an aerotropolis and a strong economic base for the region and internationally.

news.title: Varanasi: 150 buildings razed so far for road widening project
news.para: Despite a high court stay order for three buildings, PWD demolished 13 others on Sunday as part of the Dalmandi road widening project. This brings the total razed structures to nearly 150, with 187 buildings slated for removal to widen the road and improve access to Kashi Vishwanath Dham.

news.title: Gujarat tops SVAMITVA drive, issues over half of all property cards prepared across the country
news.para: Gujarat leads the nation in implementing the Pradhan Mantri-SVAMITVA scheme's Phase II, issuing over half of all property cards nationwide. Drone mapping has been completed in more than 11,500 villages, providing formal legal documentation for rural residents and enabling easier access to banking services and loans.

news.title: Residency Hotels to invest ₹600 crore in three new luxury hotels
news.para: The Residency Hotels is injecting Rs 600 crore into expanding its footprint across South India with three new luxury properties, aiming to add 450-500 rooms. This significant investment follows the recent launch of a Rs 450 crore hotel in Madurai and ongoing development of two hotels in Mysuru and a second Maldives resort slated for 2027.

news.title: Hong Kong's Lai Sun Development to launch exchange offer for $493 million notes due 2026
news.para: Hong Kong's Lai Sun Development is offering eligible noteholders an exchange for their $493 million 5.00% guaranteed notes due 2026. Holders can swap for new U.S. dollar-denominated senior guaranteed notes with an 8% annual interest rate and a three-year tenor. The offer is contingent on proceeds from a property disposal by July 22.

news.title: Jaipur courts seized of multiple applications arising from FIRs against builder; investigations continue
news.para: Real estate businessman Gyan Chandra Agarwal faces multiple court applications concerning criminal cases registered between 2019 and 2023, involving allegations of cheating and forgery. The Enforcement Directorate has launched a money laundering investigation based on these FIRs, conducting searches and examining financial records.  Complainants and investor groups are seeking updates on the ongoing investigations.

news.title: Tight housing market boosts New York office conversions
news.para: New York real estate firms are increasingly converting office buildings into apartment complexes as an antidote to the city's housing crunch, tapping into tax incentives also designed to increase the supply of affordable homes. "My belief is just about any building could be converted as residential,"during a tour of an office highrise at 77 Water Street the firm is converting into a residential building.

news.title: ‘No power of review’: Bombay HC nixes deemed conveyance to housing society
news.para: The Bombay High Court has quashed a deemed conveyance order, stating the competent authority lacked the power to entertain a second application on a finalized issue. Justice Farhan Dubash ruled the deputy registrar exercised an unrecognized review power, barring the second application by principles of finality and res judicata.

news.title: Odisha government to introduce new act soon as it plans major shift in urban rental housing
news.para: Odisha is set to introduce the draft Odisha Urban Area Rent Control Act, 2026, replacing the 1967 act. The legislation mandates written agreements, caps security deposits, and establishes rent authorities and courts for speedy dispute resolution, aiming to balance tenant and landlord rights.

news.title: Panchkula civic body to discuss property tax waiver in its first General House meeting
news.para: Panchkula's first General House meeting on June 16 will focus on key development agendas, including making Ward No. 4 a model cleanliness ward and implementing a property tax amnesty to recover ₹100 crore in dues. The meeting will also address civic infrastructure upgrades, waterlogging solutions, and broader development goals like recreation centers and sports facilities.

news.title: Gurugram: DTCP to resume crackdown on illegal builds in DLF phases next week
news.para: The Department of Town and Country Planning (DTCP) in Gurugram is set to resume large-scale enforcement against illegal constructions in DLF Phase 3 and other phases. Following a high court order, over 3,500 properties are now eligible for action, targeting extensions, stilt parking violations, and unauthorized commercial use.

news.title: IT hubs, Aerocity, Metro rail network feature in revised Visakhapatnam's master plan
news.para: Visakhapatnam Metropolitan Region Development Authority submitted a revised master plan-2041 to the Andhra Pradesh government, prioritizing sustainable growth with infrastructure, economic development, and environmental conservation. The plan, designed for an estimated population of 66.3 lakh by 2041, balances land use, transportation, and industrial growth across three districts.
